title: phyllanthus pumilus
intro: Phyllanthus pumilus, also known as the dwarf phyllanthus, is a small, shrub-like plant native to tropical regions. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Phyllanthus pumilus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate liver and kidney issues, and support immune system function. Herbal preparations of Phyllanthus pumilus can be found in various forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used in traditional medicine practices.
